headline.text: L1 left S2 merge floor heavy wash incomplete (no air fitting) and couldn't start S2 pack cleaning due to *labor shortage on second shift*.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 completed an Oreo aligner trial after 3x clean/swab protocol and closed a curtain gap in the new pack area, but S2's merge system level 4 clean remains incomplete and labor shortages delayed pack area cleaning on second shift.
per_plant_summary.L2: No activity in the last 24 hours.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 cleared four machine faults (mold alarm, HMI pin, printer, and one camera alarm) and completed a level 2 clean on schedule, but one earlier camera fault had no recorded resolution.

notes.text: New work order created for item 21098 for Monday's production; original WO will not be used.
Film/roll change taking 12 minutes and blade cleaning 23 minutes, within the 30-minute planned downtime allowance.
Monday SRS run must start at 07:00; third shift to run 4 hours then begin cleaning.

resolved.title: New pack area level 4 clean for contractor work
resolved.summary: Pack area needed level 4 clean and heavy floor wash before Monday startup due to contractor drilling, conduit cutting, and metal debris; required sticky rollers first then metaquat mop.
resolved.resolution: Conner Boyd reported second wash and test completed by 23:59, third clean and test completed by Joseph Scott at 01:35.

resolved.title: Curtain gap in new pack area
resolved.summary: Entire section of curtain detached in newly configured pack area; Jorel flagged as immediate safety/contamination risk with photos.
resolved.resolution: Conner Boyd closed the gap by 17:51 and continued patching other areas along the floor.

resolved.title: Oreo aligner new equipment cleaning protocol
resolved.summary: New aligner part for MDLZ Oreo trial required 3x clean and 3x swab per new equipment policy; quality flagged the gap after initial ATP-only approach.
resolved.resolution: Joseph Scott completed third clean and ATP test at 02:04, all 1,800 beads accounted for after trial completed at 04:56.

resolved.title: Caramel supply pause vs. slowdown
resolved.summary: Line paused for caramel at 20:22 (C2 had 47 min, C1 had 38 min); supervisor requested slowdown instead of full pause to maintain flow.
resolved.resolution: After the pause, line slowed to 68 RR at 20:54 per Curt's request (Conner Boyd).

resolved.title: Mold alarm on ML1
resolved.summary: Mold alarm triggered at 15:30; maintenance not on-site, Nathan asked Preston for clearance to restart.
resolved.resolution: Running again by 15:35 — "We are now running" (Imperial).

resolved.title: HMI pin fault on ML1
resolved.summary: HMI pin fault stopped line at 17:56 on third shift.

resolved.title: Printer fault on ML1 flow-wrap
resolved.summary: 1880 printer failed at 00:08, needed new service module; maintenance on-site working repair.
resolved.resolution: Repaired by 00:34 — "Printer is repaired waiting for it to warm up line is running" (Molding Line 1 Flow-Wrap).

resolved.title: Display color shade variation on same pallet
resolved.summary: Darker and lighter displays mixed on same pallet; sorted to process lighter shades first to avoid color mixing in finished goods.
resolved.resolution: Darker displays separated out, lighter processed first, then darker to follow once exhausted (David Zuniaga 10:42).

resolved.title: Camera alarm (second incident) on ML1
resolved.summary: Camera alarm triggered at 23:22; maintenance, QA, and supervisor inspected the line.
resolved.resolution: No issues found by 23:28 — it was a dirty pin (Imperial).

needs_attention.title: Lock left on S2 packing belt after level clean
needs_attention.summary: Contractor asked Amy to remove lock left on S2 MM packing belt; leads need to ensure all locks removed after level cleans per LOTO protocol.
needs_attention.status: Flagged to Jody Howse and Dakota Adair at 14:03, no follow-up action recorded.

needs_attention.title: S2 pack area cleaning not started due to labor shortage
needs_attention.summary: Second shift couldn't send EEs to start S2 pack cleaning after Eaglestone left due to labor shortages; Conner looking for team of 2-3 to start at 20:30.
needs_attention.status: Conner said he'd post back shortly at 20:30, but no update was provided by window close.

needs_attention.title: S2 merge system level 4 clean incomplete — heavy wash pending
needs_attention.summary: Level 4 clean on merge system completed scrub and mop, but heavy floor wash couldn't be done because air fitting for foamer was missing; needs completion Monday.
needs_attention.status: Joseph reported at 06:32 that heavy wash still needs completion Monday; no air fitting found for foamer.

needs_attention.title: Sticky roller handles missing for new pack area clean
needs_attention.summary: Floor sticky rollers found but handles missing; needed for new pack area debris removal before sweep/mop per Jorel's instructions.
needs_attention.status: Katya found rollers at 14:17 but no handles; Jorel asked if current handles fit at 14:27, no answer recorded.

needs_attention.title: Nine pallets with uneven stacking couldn't load
needs_attention.summary: Warehouse couldn't load 9 pallets due to uneven stacking; 3 rewrapped and secured, working on remaining 6 by end of second shift.
needs_attention.status: Three pallets rewrapped by 17:58, working to finish other 6 by end of shift; no confirmation of completion.

needs_attention.title: Camera fault on ML1 (first incident)
needs_attention.summary: Camera fault reported at 12:29 with maintenance inspecting the line.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance in line inspecting as of 12:29, no resolution or follow-up recorded.
